query: My teammate's Docker container has the exact same Dockerfile as mine — same FROM line, same pip install steps — but the model produces different outputs. We checked the requirements file and lockfile and they match. What's going on?
expected_behavior: Identifies base-image drift as the most likely cause: the FROM tag (e.g. python:3.13-slim) is floating and can resolve to different image content over time at the registry
Recommends pinning the base image to a SHA256 digest (FROM image@sha256:...) rather than a tag, so both builds reference bit-identical bytes
Explains that lockfiles only pin application-level dependencies, not the underlying OS image, system libraries, or interpreter build — and the difference can change numerical outputs
